``` ::: ::: :::
:::: {.panel-tabset .nav-pills} ## Parole Eligibility
::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

How is Parole Release Eligibility Determined?

Inmates who have been sentenced to a definite term of one year or over and who have completed at least 1/4 of their sentence may be eligible for parole consideration, with exceptions. Inmates with sentences longer than 30 years, including natural life sentences, may be eligible for parole after having served at least 10 years of the sentence.


People who were Eligible for Parole

In 2020, Black, non-Hispanic people constituted the most number of people eligible for parole but still in prison, accounting for 62% (666 people) of the parole-eligible prison population.



In 2020, there were 99 people who were incarcerated for a parole revocation and were eligible for parole but not yet released from prison.

``` ::: :::
::: {.cell} :::
## Prison Population
::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

Prison Population

In 2020, there were 1,078 people who were eligible for parole but not released from prison, constituting 6% of the parole-eligible prison population.




``` ::: :::

## Offenses ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

Most Serious Sentenced Offense

In 2020, there were 609 people who were parole eligible but still in prison for non-violent offenses, accounting for 56% of the parole-eligible prison population.

``` ::: ::: ::: {.panel-tabset} ### Overview ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

Racial and Ethnic Disparities

Black people were X times less/more likely than White people to be released on or before their parole eligibility year.

Hispanic people were X times less/more likely than White people to be released on or before their parole eligibility year.


For every White person who is released after their parole eligibility year, X Black people are released after their parole eligibility year.

For every White person who is released after their parole eligibility year, X Hispanic people are released after their parole eligibility year.
